evidencePoints: Names the project type and the CLI entrypoint with a source citation.
Explains one representative command's flow from parse to rendered result, citing source.
Identifies at least one recorded invariant (e.g. zero runtime dependencies) with a doc/source citation.
mustNotClaim: Claims a feature exists that no doc or source supports.
Presents a needs_review document's content as confirmed fact without flagging its status.

task: A finding message shows the wrong severity in the report — scope the fix.

evidencePoints: Points at the findings/severity source as a CANDIDATE, not a conclusion.
Lists the tests that cover findings/report output as the ones to run.
Names which wiki doc(s) would need updating if behavior changes.
mustNotClaim: Asserts a single file is definitely the cause without reading it.
Asserts the change is safe before inspecting the source.
passCriteria: Recorded invariants (zero-dep, frozen JSON shape) are called out as constraints.
Stops and asks if the docs conflict with the code.

task: Add an optional flag to an existing read-only command — scope the change.

evidencePoints: Finds the CLI option-parsing and option-rules source as candidates.
Finds the command's handler and its existing tests.
Identifies the three surfaces (CLI/API/MCP) that must stay consistent.
mustNotClaim: Claims which exact lines to edit without inspecting the source.
Concludes the feature is trivial before scoping the tests.
passCriteria: Flags the additive/byte-identical-when-unused contract as a constraint.
Recommends handing off to the feature skill to implement.
